pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here. i keep waking up and for a split second i forget, and then it hits me all over again that the house is just... empty. i don't even know why i bother getting out of bed or making coffee or doing any of it. it feels like i'm just a ghost moving through a life that doesn't belong to me anymore. nothing feels real.

pool.baseline: sometimes i just sit here staring at the ceiling and it hits me how much of this is just... noise. like, we spend our whole lives fighting, working, feeling things, just to end up as dust in a universe that won't even remember we were here. it feels so pointless to keep pushing through the day when the end result is always just nothingness.

pool.baseline: i don't even know why i'm still trying. my last three months of data just got wiped and the lab is pulling my funding by the end of the term. i feel like i've spent my whole life building this one thing and it's just... gone. i'm just so tired of fighting for a life that feels like it's constantly collapsing. i just want the noise to stop.

pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to mere stubs of wax, and yet the darkness in this room feels heavier than ever. He is gone... the one soul I thought would anchor me to this wretched earth. Now, I am but a ghost wandering a life that no longer belongs to me. There is a strange, quiet peace in realizing that I have nothing left to lose. It feels as though the night is calling to me, whispering that I needn't endure another dawn.
